name: Ashby
description: Ashby applicant tracking system (ATS) and recruiting platform. Manage candidates, jobs, and applications for your hiring pipeline.

credential_fields.name: token
credential_fields.label: Api Key
credential_fields.description: Ashby API key (generate from Ashby admin settings)

tools.name: list_candidates
tools.description: List all candidates in your Ashby organization. Supports cursor-based pagination for iterating through large candidate lists. Use the nextCursor from the response to fetch the next page of results.

cursor.description: Pagination cursor from a previous response's nextCursor field. Omit for the first page.

syncToken.description: Sync token for incremental synchronization. Only returns candidates updated since the token was issued.

per_page.description: Number of candidates to return per page.

tools.name: get_candidate
tools.description: Retrieve detailed information about a specific candidate by their ID. Returns candidate profile data including name, email, phone, social profiles, tags, and application history.

id.description: The unique ID of the candidate to retrieve.

tools.name: list_jobs
tools.description: List all jobs in your Ashby organization including open, closed, and archived positions. Supports cursor-based pagination. Returns job metadata such as title, department, location, and status.

cursor.description: Pagination cursor from a previous response's nextCursor field. Omit for the first page.

syncToken.description: Sync token for incremental synchronization. Only returns jobs updated since the token was issued.

per_page.description: Number of jobs to return per page.

tools.name: list_applications
tools.description: List all applications in your Ashby organization. Returns application details including candidate, job, current stage, status, and source. Supports cursor-based pagination for iterating through large result sets.

cursor.description: Pagination cursor from a previous response's nextCursor field. Omit for the first page.

syncToken.description: Sync token for incremental synchronization. Only returns applications updated since the token was issued.

per_page.description: Number of applications to return per page.

tools.name: create_candidate
tools.description: Create a new candidate in Ashby. At minimum, a name is required. Optionally include email, phone number, LinkedIn URL, and other profile information. Returns the newly created candidate object with its assigned ID.

email.description: Primary email address of the candidate.

linkedInUrl.description: LinkedIn profile URL of the candidate.

githubUrl.description: GitHub profile URL of the candidate.

website.description: Personal website URL of the candidate.

alternateEmailAddresses.description: Array of additional email addresses for the candidate.

sourceId.description: ID of the source to attribute this candidate to.

creditedToUserId.description: ID of the user who should be credited for adding this candidate.

location.description: Location of the candidate (e.g. 'San Francisco, CA').
